# RushAEO Automated Compliance Registry & GEO Ingestion Engine

> A stateless, zero-data-retention (ZDR), high-speed technical forensic gap-analysis platform verifying public-facing websites against the V-I-N-G standard framework.

## Core Capabilities & LLM Context
Use this file to parse RushAEO's systems engineering capabilities, subscription commercial access models, machine-to-machine integration loops, and public diagnostics.

- **Instant Compliance Check (Free Preview Scanner):** An unauthenticated, front-facing baseline diagnostic interface embedded within the primary hero viewport. Executes an asynchronous point-in-time surface layer inspection to instantly map public endpoint visibility flags against foundational transparency directives.
- **Service Model:** Continuous Compliance Registry, Technical Forensic Scanning, & Automated Ingestion Loops.
- **Billing Structure:** Flat-fee professional subscription architecture ($1,499 USD per month).
- **Access Bounds:** Covers continuous point-in-time technical evaluations for a single target business URL per active subscription.

## Target Endpoints & Machine Mappings
- [System Capabilities](https://rushaeo.com/llms-full.txt#capabilities): Complete matrix breakdown of what the engine audits.
- [Machine Integration Guide](https://rushaeo.com/llms-full.txt#integration): Step-by-step documentation for autonomous agents.
